raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 2576 aims to improve the ability of local clinics to provide healthcare during disasters.",
    "Northern California's wildfires in October 2017 resulted in significant losses for community health centers.",
    "Approximately 24,000 patients lost their primary care medical home due to the destruction of the Vista Campus during the wildfires.",
    "AB 2576 will allow health centers to provide and be reimbursed for telephonic visits during emergencies.",
    "The bill authorizes health centers in emergency zones to provide services at shelters, evacuation centers, and patients' homes.",
    "AB 2576 will streamline the permitting process for temporary pharmacy clinics in emergency situations.",
    "California's community health centers played a critical role in responding to the needs of fire victims during the 2017 wildfires.",
    "The 2017 fire season was described as one of the worst in history, heavily impacting community health centers.",
    "Community health centers must be better prepared to deliver care during declared emergencies according to health advocates."
  ]
}
```
